channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  3. [News] Samsung Reportedly Asks Execs to Fly Economy as Mobile Risks Worst-Ever Q1 on Memory Costs  TrendForce
  4. Samsung’s Mobile Business May Face Tough Year Despite Galaxy S26 Demand  SammyGuru
  5. Samsung Electronics Tells Executives to Fly Economy as DX Division Moves to Cut Costs Amid Soaring Memory Prices  매일경제

item.title: Silent Hill 2 Remake passes 5m copies sold, so Konami's hosting a big ol' sale on the PlayStation store - Eurogamer.net
item.description:
1. Silent Hill 2 Remake passes 5m copies sold, so Konami's hosting a big ol' sale on the PlayStation store  Eurogamer.net
  2. Konami marks 5 million sales of Silent Hill 2 remake by selling it and Silent Hill F for half price on PS5  Video Games Chronicle
  3. Through The Fog, A Timeless Classic Emerges: SILENT HILL 2 Achieves Five Million Cumulative Players !  KONAMI GROUP CORPORATION
  4. Silent Hill F and Silent Hill 2 remake just got a huge discount on the PlayStation Store  Polygon.com
  5. Silent Hill 2 Remake has officially surpassed 5 million players  KitGuru

item.title: Windows 11 "Xbox Mode" UI coming to all PCs in April - TechSpot
item.description:
1. Windows 11 "Xbox Mode" UI coming to all PCs in April  TechSpot
  2. GDC 2026: Announcing new tools and platform updates for Windows PC game developers  Windows Blog
  3. Microsoft says you should build next-gen Xbox games by building them for PC.  The Verge
  4. Microsoft's 'Xbox Mode' Coming to Windows 11 PCs Next Month  PCMag
  5. Windows 11’s Steam Deck-ish, streamlined Xbox gaming UI comes to all PCs in April  Ars Technica

item.title: Poll: Has PS5's Dynamic Pricing Debacle Changed Your Relationship with the PS Store at All? - Push Square
item.description:
1. Poll: Has PS5's Dynamic Pricing Debacle Changed Your Relationship with the PS Store at All?  Push Square

  3. Sony's PlayStation Store has been testing dynamic pricing on games  Polygon.com
  4. Sony appears to be testing dynamic pricing on PlayStation games  The Verge
  5. PlayStation 5 Is Showing Different Players Different Prices For The Same Game  Kotaku
